---
title: "My Adventures in New York City"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cerulean
---

These are some of my favorite places in New York City, the city that never sleeps! 


### (1) The Press Lounge Rooftop Bar

Located on 653 11th Avenue, the rooftop bar offers amazing views of the Manhattan skyline and Hudson River with a 
360 degree view! This is definitely one of my favorite rooftop bars in Manhattan.


#### Here's a link to the official website of the Rooftop Bar

* [The Press Lounge](https://www.thepresslounge.com/)


### (2) Brooklyn Bridge 

One of the icons of New York would be the Brooklyn Bridge, also one of my favorite sites in New York.
Walking on the bridge, which took me about 30 minutes, offers a surreal experience!


#### Here's a link to the website for the guide to Brooklyn Bridge

* [Brooklyn Bridge](https://www.nycgo.com/articles/guide-to-the-brooklyn-bridge)




### Link to page about me 
[About me](about.html)
